sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43242" key="e(tero/xronos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερό-χρονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of different times</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἑ</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a change of tense</tr_>, as a figure of speech, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
